meta.title: Strategic Finance Forum & Gala
meta.description: Executive forum bringing institutional leaders, strategic partners, and media voices together in Sofia.

hero.title: Strategic Finance Forum & Gala
hero.subtitle: A premium gathering for C-suite executives, institutional partners, and media stakeholders shaping regional capital markets.

about.title: About the Forum
about.body: The Strategic Finance Forum & Gala convenes leaders from banking, investment, policy, and academia to discuss capital access, economic resilience, and high-impact partnerships. The event is built for decision-makers who influence financial strategy at national and international levels.

program.title: Program
program.subtitle: A focused executive agenda designed for practical outcomes and strategic exchange.

speakers.title: Featured Speakers
speakers.subtitle: Leaders in finance, academia, and policy.

list.name: Prof. Stanislav Gyoshev
list.role: Chair, Faculty of Economics and Business Administration
list.bio: Professor Gyoshev leads regional dialogue on strategic finance, institutional cooperation, and sustainable market development.

list.name: Elena Petrova
list.bio: Elena advises institutional clients on cross-border growth strategies and investment frameworks.

list.name: Daniel Marinov
list.bio: Daniel specializes in macroeconomic risk, liquidity cycles, and market confidence indicators.

media.title: Multimedia
media.subtitle: Selected interviews with Prof. Stanislav Gyoshev.

partners.title: Media Partners
partners.subtitle: Strategic media institutions supporting visibility and public dialogue.

team.title: Board and Organizing Team
team.subtitle: The Board of C4BG with dedicated executive leadership.

history.title: C4BG Event Highlights
history.subtitle: Selected milestones from the past year.

items.title: Regional Capital Forum
items.description: Focused sessions on investment readiness and sovereign risk management.

items.title: Institutional Partnership Roundtable
items.description: Framework agreements between academic and private-sector stakeholders.

items.title: Pre-Gala Strategy Briefing
items.description: Executive workshop on growth financing and cross-border collaboration.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.text: C4BG acts as an institutional bridge among academia, corporate leadership, policy experts, and media. Through this forum, partners align around practical initiatives that strengthen the financial ecosystem and elevate regional competitiveness.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: For institutional partnerships and media inquiries, use the form below or contact us directly.
